raw_title: Fabio Panetta: Introductory remarks – conference "Laying the groundwork for jobs in Africa: core infrastructure and business environments"
raw_content: Introductory remarks by Mr Fabio Panetta, Governor of the Bank of Italy, at the conference "Laying the goundwork for jobs in Africa: core infrastructure and business environments", organised by the Bank of Italy, Rome, 4 March 2026.
